    已过时的 API

    目录

    • 接口
    • 类
    • 字段

    • 枚举常量
    • 已过时的 接口
      接口
      说明
      com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.ValidatorAnnotations
    • 已过时的 类
      类
      说明
      com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.JAXRSAnnotations
      Java EE has been renamed to Jakarta EE, an upgrade is recommended.
    • 已过时的 字段
      字段
      说明
      com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.SpringMvcAnnotations.REQUEST_HERDER
    • 已过时的 方法
      方法
      说明
      com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.HttpStatusEnum.Series.valueOf(HttpStatusEnum)
      as of 5.3, in favor of invoking HttpStatusEnum.series() directly
      com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.ApiErrorCodeDictionary.dict()
    • 已过时的 枚举常量
      枚举常量
      说明
      com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.HttpStatusEnum.DESTINATION_LOCKED
      See WebDAV Draft Changes
      com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.HttpStatusEnum.INSUFFICIENT_SPACE_ON_RESOURCE
      See WebDAV Draft Changes
      com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.HttpStatusEnum.METHOD_FAILURE
      See WebDAV Draft Changes
      com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.HttpStatusEnum.MOVED_TEMPORARILY
      in favor of HttpStatusEnum.FOUND which will be returned from HttpStatus.valueOf(302)
      com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.HttpStatusEnum.REQUEST_ENTITY_TOO_LARGE
      in favor of HttpStatusEnum.PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE which will be returned from HttpStatus.valueOf(413)
      com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.HttpStatusEnum.REQUEST_URI_TOO_LONG
      in favor of HttpStatusEnum.URI_TOO_LONG which will be returned from HttpStatus.valueOf(414)
      com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.HttpStatusEnum.USE_PROXY
      due to security concerns regarding in-band configuration of a proxy
